case_title: MAINTENANCE SYSTEMS MANAGEMENT VS LINCOLN UNIVERSITY -DR.CLARENCE RIPPEL

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAINTENANCE SYSTEMS MANAGEMENT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LINCOLN UNIVERSITY -DR.CLARENCE RIPPEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY MAINTENANCE SYSTEMS MANAGEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LINCOLN UNIVERSITY -DR.CLARENCE RIPPEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-15-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-19-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO CLARENCE RIPPEL RETURNED SIGNED.
